Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CLAUDECI DASILVA's Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions As Against Plaintiff is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest J. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nairi Patterson, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Hunter, Tel. 510.457.3440, for defendant and moving party, via Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CLAUDECI DASILVA's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $843. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
